uplink._note: Upstream EM400-TLD example input. Authored expected: position byte 1 = tilt -> action.motion.detected=true; battery is a percent extra; distance (mm) is an extra; temperature s16le(1,1)=257 -> 25.7 C.
Synthetic: position byte 0 = normal -> action.motion.detected=false. temperature s16le(246,255)=-10 -> -1.0 C; distance u16le(244,1)=500 mm.

uplink.description: unrecognized channel id yields an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: channel 0xff is not a known Milesight channel; loop breaks before recognizing anything.
